text: God loves those who sleep early and rise with the dawn.
Blessed are the rich, for they shall inherit everything in this world.
And the angel said unto me, technology shall be the answer to mankind's suffering.
On the eighth day, God created coffee and saw that it was good.
The Lord helps those who help themselves, for self-reliance is divine.
reason: Psalms only has 150 chapters. Also, this is a common misattribution — not actually in the Bible.
